_comment: MPL canonical site data for 5552 Redwood Street ADU project.

site.transit_priority_area: verify — check ½-mi walk to MTS stop
site.notes: APN and lot dimensions to be confirmed via SD County Assessor. VHFHSZ and TPA status must be verified before submittal.

project.description: 2-story detached Accessory Dwelling Unit — 1,200 sf, wood-frame, stucco exterior, slab-on-grade foundation, composition shingle roof. Associated site work: grading, utility connections (water, sewer, electrical), landscaping.
project.sprinkler_basis: Primary dwelling unsprinklered — waiver per Gov Code §65852.2 and IB-400 (Aug 2025)

setbacks.note: ADU >16 ft / 2-story → 4 ft rear and interior side required per SDMC 141.0302 + Ord. O-21989 Aug 2025

project.parking_basis: Verify: within ½-mi transit (TPA) or state ADU exemption

permits.trade_row: verify — sidewalk/curb repair along Redwood St frontage
permits.soils_report: waived — standard residential flat developed lot
